benefits.description: Dropped from 182 to 163 lbs over 6 weeks
Appetite help allowed easy maintenance of 1700-1800 calorie diet despite usually eating a ton

side_effects.description: Resting BPM when sleeping increased from mid-high 30s to mid 40s

protocol_notes: Started at 1.5mg every 5 days due to initial reconstitution error; maintained this dose throughout 6-week cycle. User has extensive training background (4 years lifting) and was already lean before starting, describing use as a testing tool rather than necessity. Height 5'8-9". Nutrition carefully managed with solid macros and complete micronutrients. User emphasizes importance of using GLP-1s as appetite-retraining tool rather than weight-loss crutch.
